zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hudleston於大約1382年出生在英國波藍德米洛姆時，她的父親Sir John Hudleston III63歲，母親Catherine Tempest23歲。她於大約1407年與Sir Christopher Curwen I在英國波藍德米洛姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1468年在英國波藍德沃爾金頓享年88歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波藍德沃爾金頓聖 米可艾爾也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Hudleston于大约1382年出生在英国波藍德米洛姆时，她的父亲Sir John Hudleston III63岁，母亲Catherine Tempest23岁。她于大约1407年与Sir Christopher Curwen I在英国波藍德米洛姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1468年在英国波藍德沃爾金頓享年88岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波藍德沃爾金頓聖 米可艾爾也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hudleston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Huddleston
meanings: English: habitational name from Huddleston (Yorkshire), from an Old English personal name Hūdel (genitive Hūdeles; see Huddle ) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hudleston was born about 1382, in Millom, Cumberland, England, her father, Sir John Hudleston III, was 63 and her mother, Catherine Tempest, was 23. She married Sir Christopher Curwen I about 1407, in Millom, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died about 1468, in Workington, Cumberland, England, at the age of 88, and was buried in St Michael's Church, Workington, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Sir Christopher Curwen I environ 1407, à Millom, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1468, à Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à St Michael's Church, Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat um 1407 in Millom, Cumberland, England Sir Christopher Curwen I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb um 1468 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Workington, Cumberland, England und wurde in St Michael's Church, Workington, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Christopher Curwen I circa 1407, nel Millom, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. ko.Saint Michael's Church, Workington, Cumb: 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 워킨그턴 스트 믹하얼'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hudleston(이)가 대략 1382년 영국 c벌랜드 미롬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Hudleston III(은)는 63세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Tempest(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1407년 영국 c벌랜드 미롬에서 Sir Christopher Curwen I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1468년 영국 c벌랜드 워킨그턴에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 워킨그턴 스트 믹하얼'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Christopher Curwen I aproximadamente 1407, em Millom, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.Saint Michael's Church, Workington, Cumb: ст мачаел'с чурч, воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hudleston родилась около 1382 г. в местности миллом, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Hudleston III было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Tempest, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Christopher Curwen I около 1407 г. в местности миллом, кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла около 1468 г. в местности воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мачаел'с чурч, воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.
